---
title: "About"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-band">
  <span class="section-label section-label-light">About Me</span>
  <h1>Pawan Jangra</h1>
  <p>Data Analyst · Survey Researcher · Economic Researcher · New Delhi, India</p>
</div>

<div class="about-wrap">
  <div class="profile-card">
    <div class="avatar">PJ</div>
    <div class="profile-name">Pawan Jangra</div>
    <div class="profile-role">Data Analyst &amp; Research Consultant</div>
    <div class="profile-links">
      <a href="mailto:pawanjangra1198@gmail.com" class="profile-link">✉️ pawanjangra1198@gmail.com</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/pawan1198" class="profile-link" target="_blank">💻 github.com/pawan1198</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/pawanjangra1198/" class="profile-link" target="_blank">🔗 pawanjangra1198</a>
      <a href="https://twitter.com/pawanjangra1198" class="profile-link" target="_blank">🐦 @pawanjangra1198</a>
      <a href="#" class="profile-link">📍 New Delhi, India</a>
    </div>
    <div class="tag-list" style="margin-top:1.5rem;justify-content:center;">
      <span class="tag tag-blue">R</span><span class="tag tag-teal">Quarto</span>
      <span class="tag tag-dark">data.table</span><span class="tag tag-dark">ggplot2</span>
      <span class="tag tag-blue">ODK</span><span class="tag tag-amber">Shiny</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div>
    <span class="section-label">Who I Am</span>
    <h2 class="section-title" style="margin-bottom:1.5rem;">Hello 👋</h2>
    <div class="about-prose">
      <p>I'm a <strong>data analyst and independent economic researcher</strong> with over 7 years of experience in survey methodology, statistical analysis, and research coordination across India. My work sits at the intersection of economics, statistics, and data science — translating complex survey microdata into clear, policy-relevant insights.</p>
      <p>I have worked with leading institutions including <strong>OP Jindal Global University</strong>, the <strong>IDEAs Advanced Certificate Programme</strong>, and the <strong>Society for Social and Economic Research (SSER)</strong>. My domain expertise spans labour economics, agricultural markets, fiscal policy, and trade.</p>
      <p>I specialise in <strong>reproducible research workflows</strong>: building fully documented, version-controlled pipelines in R and Quarto — from blog posts to full 18-chapter textbooks and interactive Shiny dashboards.</p>
    </div>

    <h3 style="font-family:'Fraunces',serif;color:#0f172a;font-size:1.25rem;margin:2.5rem 0 1.25rem;">Technical Skills</h3>
    <div class="skill-grid">
      <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>R / Tidyverse / data.table</span><span class="skill-pct">93%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:93%"></div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>Quarto / RMarkdown</span><span class="skill-pct">90%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:90%"></div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>ggplot2 / ggiraph / Shiny</span><span class="skill-pct">88%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:88%"></div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>ODK / SurveyCTO / CAPI</span><span class="skill-pct">88%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:88%"></div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>Statistical Modelling / Econometrics</span><span class="skill-pct">82%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:82%"></div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>Python / Pandas / Selenium</span><span class="skill-pct">78%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:78%"></div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>Linux / Bash / Git</span><span class="skill-pct">75%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:75%"></div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>Web Scraping (rvest / RSelenium)</span><span class="skill-pct">72%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:72%"></div></div></div>
    </div>

    <h3 style="font-family:'Fraunces',serif;color:#0f172a;font-size:1.25rem;margin:2.5rem 0 1.25rem;">Get in Touch</h3>
    <div class="contact-grid">
      <a href="https://github.com/pawan1198" class="contact-card" target="_blank"><span class="contact-card-icon">💻</span><div><strong>GitHub</strong><span>@pawan1198</span></div></a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/pawanjangra1198/" class="contact-card" target="_blank"><span class="contact-card-icon">🔗</span><div><strong>LinkedIn</strong><span>pawanjangra1198</span></div></a>
      <a href="mailto:pawanjangra1198@gmail.com" class="contact-card"><span class="contact-card-icon">✉️</span><div><strong>Email</strong><span>pawanjangra1198@gmail.com</span></div></a>
      <a href="https://twitter.com/pawanjangra1198" class="contact-card" target="_blank"><span class="contact-card-icon">🐦</span><div><strong>Twitter / X</strong><span>@pawanjangra1198</span></div></a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
